ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the campaign */,
  "main_category" TEXT /* Main category under which the campaign falls */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency in which the campaign is set */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the campaign */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal set by the creator */,
  "launched" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the campaign was launched */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged by backers */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Current state of the campaign (e.g., live, successful, failed) */,
  "backers" INTEGER /* Number of backers who supported the campaign */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campaign is based */,
  "usd_pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged in USD */,
  "usd_pledged_real" REAL /* Real amount pledged in USD accounting for conversion */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was created */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign status was last updated */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign video */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_image" TEXT /* URL of the project image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Music, Fashion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign to which the pledge is made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the pledge */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the user */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward chosen by the backer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES campaign_rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign to which the update relates */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., news, behind-the-scenes, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES campaign_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign offering the reward */,
  "amount_required" REAL /* Amount required to qualify for the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times this reward can be claimed */,
  "reward_image" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., USD, CAD) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate to USD */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency (e.g., $, £) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., live, successful, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analytics entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the analytics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the campaign has received */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of views to pledges */,
  "average_pledge" REAL /* Average amount pledged per backer */,
  "social_shares" INTEGER /* Number of social shares the campaign has received */,
  "email_open_rate" REAL /* Email open rate for campaign notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backer_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer reward */,
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pledge related to the reward */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_sent" INTEGER /* Whether the reward has been sent to the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backer_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backer_rewards_pledge_id FOREIGN KEY ("pledge_id") REFERENCES pledges ("pledge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creator_campaigns" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator managing the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id", "campaign_id")
)
